claim_boundary: synthetic perspective-skewed planar gate fixture only
commands: uv run --python 3.14 --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_perception_geometry.py tests/test_perception_detector.py
non_claims: not unlabeled square-gate in-plane roll disambiguation evidence

tests.name: test_planar_pnp_recovers_perspective_skewed_gate_pose
tests.purpose: recover synthetic skewed gate pose with absolute fixture tolerances

tests.name: test_planar_pnp_recovers_rolled_gate_pose
tests.purpose: recover physical-labeled rolled gate pose with absolute fixture tolerances

tests.name: test_planar_pnp_rejects_wrong_corner_winding
tests.purpose: reject reversed physical-label winding before solving

tests.name: test_detect_round1_gates_finds_orange_square
tests.purpose: verify detector output includes deterministic bbox-derived corner uncertainty
